accurate.why: All key claims match bill text: expanded NIH fields, Centers of Excellence extension, reauthorization through FY2029, and reporting requirements.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; says 'increasing authorized funding levels' without specific figures, which avoids errors.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the bill as enhancing and reauthorizing autism programs through FY2029.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Notes specific changes: field expansions, Centers of Excellence extension, terminology updates, IACC strategic plan requirement.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes specific reporting deadlines and conditions for the various reports.

effective_dates.why: Correctly states reauthorization through September 30, 2029 and report deadlines of 2 and 4 years.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers NIH expansion, program reauthorizations, IACC updates, HHS technical assistance, and reporting.

concise.why: No significant padding; appropriate detail level.

correct_entities.why: NIH, HHS, IACC, Indian Tribes all correctly identified.

correct_figures.why: No specific dollar amounts stated; avoids errors by omitting figures.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
